title: Curvature Calculation
description: Compute curvature of a curve in space
mermaid: graph TD A1[Input: Parametric Curve r(t)] --> B1["Compute: r'(t) (Tangent Vector)"] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff B1 --> C1[Intermediate: Tangent Vector r'(t)] style C1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff C1 --> D1["Compute: ||r'(t)|| (Speed)"] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1 --> E1[Intermediate: Speed ||r'(t)||] style E1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff E1 --> F1["Compute: T(t) = r'(t) / ||r'(t)|| (Unit Tangent Vector)"] style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff F1 --> G1[Intermediate: Unit Tangent Vector T(t)] style G1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff G1 --> H1["Compute: T'(t) (Derivative of Unit Tangent)"] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> I1[Intermediate: Derivative of Unit Tangent T'(t)] style I1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff I1 --> J1["Compute: ||T'(t)|| (Magnitude of T'(t))"] style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1 --> K1[Intermediate: Magnitude of T'(t), ||T'(t)||] style K1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff K1 --> L1["Compute: Curvature κ(t) = ||T'(t)|| / ||r'(t)||"] style L1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff L1 --> M1[Output: Curvature κ(t)] style M1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
entities: /"Compute: r'(t) (Tangent Vector)"/)style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff B1 --> C1[Intermediate: Tangent Vector r'(t)
/"Compute: T(t) = r'(t) / ||r'(t)|| (Unit Tangent Vector)"/)style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff F1 --> G1[Intermediate: Unit Tangent Vector T(t)
/"Compute: T'(t) (Derivative of Unit Tangent)"/)style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> I1[Intermediate: Derivative of Unit Tangent T'(t)
/"Compute: ||T'(t)|| (Magnitude of T'(t))"/)style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1 --> K1[/"Intermediate: Magnitude of T'(t), ||T'(t)||" /
/"Compute: Curvature κ(t) = ||T'(t)|| / ||r'(t)||"/)style L1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff L1 --> M1[Output: Curvature κ(t)
